MaxLineLength:FavoritesTermComponents.kt$Text("名称", modifier = Modifier.weight(1f), fontFamily = FontFamily.Monospace, fontSize = 9.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold, color = TermMuted)
MaxLineLength:FavoritesTermComponents.kt$Text("日期", modifier = Modifier.width(44.dp), fontFamily = FontFamily.Monospace, fontSize = 9.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold, color = TermMuted)
MaxLineLength:FootprintsComponents.kt$color = if (selected) Color.White.copy(alpha = AnimationTokens.Alpha.strong) else TextGray.copy(alpha = AnimationTokens.Alpha.visible)
MaxLineLength:FootprintsListCard.kt$ListCard(footprint = footprint, dayFormat = { DateUtils.formatMonthDayChineseFull(it) }, eventTypes = eventTypes, onClick = { onFootprintClick(footprint) })

MaxLineLength:FootprintsListCard.kt$Text(text = text, fontFamily = FontFamily.Monospace, fontSize = 9.sp, color = textColor, fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium, maxLines = 1, overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis)
MaxLineLength:FootprintsListCard.kt$internal
MaxLineLength:FootprintsListCard.kt$val customType = if (eventType.isNotBlank()) eventTypes.find { it.key == eventType } ?: eventTypes.find { it.name == eventType } else null
MaxLineLength:PhotoAlbumComponents.kt$color = if (selectedContactId == contact.id) SignalPurple.copy(alpha = 0.1f) else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant
MaxLineLength:PhotoAlbumViewer.kt$Icon(Icons.Default.AccessTime, contentDescription = null, tint = Color.White.copy(alpha = 0.6f), modifier = Modifier.size(14.dp))
MaxLineLength:PhotoAlbumViewer.kt$Icon(Icons.Default.Place, contentDescription = null, tint = Color.White.copy(alpha = 0.6f), modifier = Modifier.size(14.dp))
MaxLineLength:TabTreeContent.kt$Text(fav.title, fontFamily = FontFamily.Monospace, fontSize = 10.sp, color = TermHighlight, maxLines = 1, overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis)
MaxLineLength:ThoughtDialog.kt$Icon(Icons.Default.Close, contentDescription = "清除", modifier = Modifier.size(12.dp), tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)
MaxLineLength:ThoughtDialog.kt$Icon(Icons.Default.Close, contentDescription = "移除", modifier = Modifier.size(14.dp), tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)
MaxLineLength:ThoughtDialog.kt$color = if (selected) selectedColor.copy(alpha = AnimationTokens.Alpha.faint) else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant.copy(alpha = 0.5f)
MaxLineLength:ThoughtDialog.kt$if (selected) selectedColor.copy(alpha = AnimationTokens.Alpha.subtle) else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.outline.copy(alpha = AnimationTokens.Alpha.half)
MaxLineLength:ThoughtLevelBanner.kt$"EXP ${gamification.currentExp}/${gamification.expForNextLevel} · 距离 Lv.${gamification.nextLevel} 还需 ${gamification.expToNextLevel} EXP"
